title: Extend core-entity migrator chain backward (v0.5.0→v0.6.0 etc. if applicable)
description: The core-entity migrator chain now covers v0.6.0→v0.7.0, v0.7.0→v0.8.0, v0.8.0→v0.9.0, and v0.9.0→v1.0.0. No earlier-version migrators exist. Phase 2 of the 1.5-hour autonomous block intended to build v0.5.0→v0.6.0 and v0.4.0→v0.5.0 if those source sets exist as SPM packages but did not start. Investigation needed: do v0.5.0 and v0.4.0 core-entity-set packages exist on disk (check schema-universal/.../core-entities/)? If yes, build the migrators using the same pattern as v0.8.0→v0.9.0; document family-level shape changes declaratively in SchemaMigratorModel; smoke-test for build + descriptor metadata; commit and bump pointer. If no earlier sets exist, close this bead as 'no work needed' with that finding.
